---
title: "Jane Doe"
description: "Principal Investigator"
image: ../assets/avatar-placeholder.svg
sortorder: 1
---

*(Placeholder — copy this file for each lab member. `sortorder` controls the
position in the grid; the photo goes in `assets/` and is referenced via
`image:` above.)*

Short bio: background, what they work on in the lab, one personal touch.

[Email](mailto:jane.doe@example.edu) · [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com) · [ORCID](https://orcid.org)
